data: {"type":"response.completed","sequence_number":64,"response":{"id":"resp_01kjh1fxdtfz5trcsdkq1wrt0v","object":"response","status":"completed","created_at":1772246005,"output":[{"type":"reasoning","id":"resp_01kjh1fxdtfz6ax5qxnvxevcp8","content":[{"type":"reasoning_text","text":"We need to output a response: \"The weather in Tokyo is...\" The assistant has the weather info."}],"summary":[]},{"type":"message","id":"msg_01kjh1fxfbfz68mjr4ccyczheb","status":"completed","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"output_text","text":"In Tokyo right now it’s **22 °C** with a **partly cloudy** sky, and the humidity is about **65 %**.","annotations":[],"logprobs":[]}]}],"previous_response_id":null,"model":"openai/gpt-oss-20b","reasoning":{"effort":"medium"},"max_output_tokens":null,"text":{"format":{"type":"text"}},"tools":[{"type":"function","name":"get_weather","description":"Get the current weather for a location","parameters":{"properties":{"location":{"description":"City name","type":"string"}},"required":["location"],"type":"object"},"strict":null}],"tool_choice":"auto","truncation":"disabled","metadata":{},"groq":null,"temperature":1,"top_p":1,"user":null,"service_tier":"default","background":false,"error":null,"incomplete_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":193,"input_tokens_details":{"cached_tokens":0},"output_tokens":62,"output_tokens_details":{"reasoning_tokens":22},"total_tokens":255},"parallel_tool_calls":true,"store":false,"top_logprobs":null,"max_tool_calls":null}}
